title: Diagnose Ollama coding-agent failure — RP artifacts and verification gaps
method: code-analysis + live runtime probe (read-only; no edits to dream-chat.js this phase)
source: static analysis of apps/lantern-garage/lib/dream-chat.js + apps/lantern-garage/routes/dream.js, plus live curl probes of the local Ollama daemon

model_status.summary: Ollama daemon is up at 127.0.0.1:11434 and the configured coder model responds correctly. This contradicts the issue's premise that the model 'stopped working' — as of this probe the model is live; the real defects are prompt-framing and verification, not availability.
model_status.configured_model: lantern-sigma0-coder-v2 (set via OLLAMA_MODEL in .env; a 3.1B qwen2 Q4_K_M GGUF, the trained coder model from epic #690)
model_status.live_probe: GET /api/tags lists only 'lantern-sigma0-coder-v2:latest'. POST /api/chat to that model returned a clean 'ok' (load_duration ~0.14s, total ~0.34s warm).
model_status.default_fallback_risk: The hard-coded default when OLLAMA_MODEL is unset is 'lantern-csf-dream' (dream-chat.js:356,731), which is NOT installed (absent from /api/tags). Any deployment that does not set OLLAMA_MODEL would hit model-not-found and silently fall through to cloud. .env currently sets OLLAMA_MODEL correctly, so the live path works.
evidence: live: /api/chat to lantern-sigma0-coder-v2 returned message.content='ok', done_reason='stop'

prompt_issues.description: Every Ollama (and cloud) request wraps the user's text in dream/persona roleplay framing: the userPrompt is built as 'Dreamer says: "..." ... Respond as your persona. Keep it brief (2-4 sentences). ... Never diagnose or command.' This RP framing is applied uniformly, even for code/verification tasks, biasing the model toward short in-character prose instead of grounded code output.
evidence: dream-chat.js:651 (userPrompt template: 'Dreamer says' + 'Respond as your persona. Keep it brief (2-4 sentences).' + 'Never diagnose or command.')

prompt_issues.description: The inline _DEFAULT_PERSONAS fallback carries heavy roleplay artifacts (e.g. a literal lantern-headed being; a CRT-television caterpillar / glitch-poetry persona) that, when used, push storytelling over verification. Live personas load from apps/data/contexts/personas.json (cleaner/professional), but the fallback path remains RP-laden.
evidence: apps/data/contexts/personas.json:10-15 (live 'keystone' persona is generic technical, with no explicit code-output contract)

prompt_issues.description: The [APPLY_CODE]-style coder contract for the Keystone persona exists only in the inline fallback (not used when personas.json loads), so the live coder persona has no explicit code-output / grounding contract.
evidence: dream-chat.js:92-153 (inline keystone [APPLY_CODE] prompt, unused when personas.json present)

verification_gaps.description: The Ollama branch returns its reply directly with no verification/grounding pass and no confidence field; the only Σ₀ verify pass (verifyResponse) runs downstream in routes/dream.js and is gated off for local-only runs.
evidence: dream-chat.js:778 (Ollama success return: { reply, agent, suggestions, online, source:'ollama', webSuggestions } — no 'confidence')

verification_gaps.description: The Ollama response is scanned for a '[DOORS: ...]' token, but the userPrompt never instructs the model to emit one, so the door-suggestion extraction is effectively dead for Ollama and falls back to generic suggestions.
evidence: dream-chat.js:760 (content.match(/\[DOORS:\s*([^\]]+)\]/i)) with no corresponding instruction in the userPrompt at dream-chat.js:651

verification_gaps.description: verifyResponse (Σ₀ grounding + low-confidence revision) only runs when SIGMA0_VERIFY=true AND ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is present, and executes downstream of the Ollama call. A local Ollama-only run therefore receives zero verification and zero confidence scoring — the 'calm while wrong' failure mode (cf. #740).

recommendation.verdict: retune (prompt + verification wiring) — NOT rebuild/replace; the model itself is live and correct
actions: Bypass the RP 'Dreamer says / Respond as your persona' framing for coder and verification tasks — branch the userPrompt so code/keystone requests get a grounded code-output contract instead of in-character brevity (dream-chat.js:651).

Extend the verify/confidence pass to the local Ollama path so local-only runs still get a [claim, evidence, confidence] record — either make a lightweight self-check that does not require ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or attach a confidence field to the Ollama return (dream-chat.js:778, 1030-1034).
Either install a 'lantern-csf-dream' model or keep OLLAMA_MODEL pinned in every deployment so the unset-default does not silently fail to cloud (dream-chat.js:356,731).
Wire OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_MS into the autowork callOllama path (currently hard-coded 30s) — tracked separately in #690.
recommendation.blocked_on: none for the diagnostic itself; the retune actions are follow-on code changes (Phase 2).
